column2: WhatsApp template approval — have we submitted notification templates to Meta for pre-approval? (Required before beta, takes 1–3 days per template)
UU PDP consent screen — does personalized recommendation engine require explicit behavioral data consent at profile setup? Legal review needed.
Email service provider selection — SendGrid, AWS SES, or another ESP for weekly digest delivery?
Global notification frequency caps (2 push/day, 2 WA/week) — are these the right numbers? Validate with user research before engineering.
Matching algorithm threshold — what minimum match score (grade + category overlap) should trigger a notification? Starting at 60% — validate.
View duration tracking for deadline nudge (E04) — is 10 seconds the right threshold for "intent signal"? Too low = spam, too high = miss real interest.
Sponsored placement (E07) — when do we introduce paid recommendation slots for organizers? Requires ≥5,000 active students to be meaningful.
